entry.title: A Bittersweet Brotherhood
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,257Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 15

Summary: The beginning of a brotherhood that can only end in sadness. Or: The fourth installment of the series, and the real thing that sets everything else into motion. (Please read the other works before this; everything will make more sense).

entry.title: Monster’s baby making session
entry.summary:
Author: pastelghostsilhouette

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,661Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

entry.title: Talk me down until I get better
entry.summary:
Author: JuneJulySeptember

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,462Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 88

Summary: He really should have expected something like this. How many days — weeks? — has it been since he got here? Really, it's impressive Ra's has managed to keep his hands to himself this long.Tim doesn't so much hear him coming as sense a disturbance in the force. 'Something is off', his overwrought nervous system tells him just before Ra's large, warm hand grips the back of his neck.

entry.title: Want/Need
entry.summary:
Author: pinkapplepieshy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,833Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: When Tim wakes up naked and tied to a bed, he thinks that there's really only one thing his kidnappers could want from him. What he doesn't know is who's done this to him - and, more importantly, why. DC Noncon Fest Day 4: Breeding | Baby Trapping/Forced Pregnancy | Object Insertion

entry.summary:
Author: maelstorms

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,380Chapters: 10/26Kudos: 65

entry.title: Never a daughter, Never a sister
entry.summary:
Author: timdrakegivesmegenderenvy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,559Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 37

Summary: How Tim Drake came out to each family member :3 (this is VERY MUCH just for me, i LOVE trans tim content) ps the only canon i’ve read is the first batgirls comic, batman legends of the dark knight, and the wayne family adventures webtoon, 99% of this is fanon.

entry.title: girlhood (in a box)
entry.summary:
Author: Wyvering

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,707Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 114

Summary: Tim’s a boy. He’s been a boy his whole life, even though being a boy makes his skin itch and his stomach turn and his heart ache. Tim is a boy, but maybe he doesn’t have to be. — Tim’s a girl, she just doesn’t know it yet.

entry.title: Kitten’s Got Tweety-Tunes, Mama’s Got Sweet Moves
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,594Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: Ivy looked her dead in the eyes. “I think she’s in the walls.” Then, a small giggle echoed throughout the room. “I shouldn’t’a given’er the Mountain Dew,” Harley said, disappointed in herself.   Or:Selina enlists Harley and Ivy to babysit Trixie while she goes on a date; they're slightly irresponsible aunts, and Selina flirts a lot.

entry.title: Free Kittens
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,506Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 43

Summary: Selina’s jaw dropped. She was good at hiding her emotions, rarely surprised, even more rarely shaken, but… she hadn’t been expecting this. Two wide eyes stared at her, unblinking. One icy blue. The other a striking green, the same shade as her own.   Or:What if Tim wasn’t Jack Drake's kid, but an oopsy science experiment gone (kinda right) wrong? What if he were Janet Drake and Selina Kyle's kid?

entry.title: sleep
entry.summary:
Author: brustephs

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 662Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 72

Summary: It wasn’t like Dick had planned this. Not originally, at least. Tim had started sleeping in his bed. And it had been innocent. Tim liked to just lurk and hide in people's apartments and stuff. It wasn't like he was looking for Dick to fuck him. He thought of Dick as his brother. But Dick just couldn't stop himself. DC Non-Con Fest Day 1: Somnophilia & Drugging

entry.title: You're A God
entry.summary:
Author: Toscaredtospeak

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,920Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 18

Summary: Heroism and love mixed too well at times. Tim knew Kon because they were heroes. He loved Kon because of the hero he was. Tim’s heroism was shaped by Kon, molded by Kon’s subtle touches over the years, his body and blood dyed until he bled Kon’s colors. There was a constant he knew every time he woke up with Kon in his arms while the morning sun came in under his curtains. Tim loved KonA series of vignettes of before and after Tim says I love you. And of course, they fuck in the meantime.

entry.title: I see your sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: white_zane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,032Chapters: 9/12Kudos: 50

Summary: Did you ever think about detransitioning simply because you knew that it would kill you faster than any bullet ever could?He never actually said any of that out loud. He didn’t write it down either, afraid to make all of it real, afraid that he wouldn’t be heard anyway even if he put all of it out of there. Because usually he was fine, you know?Tim had never been a girl, but he couldn’t quite be a man either, no matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t fit into anything.A girl to most, a boy only to those that bothered to listen to him for more than five seconds. Or: Tim has been out as a Transman for some years now, but he feels like he never really got anywhere in his transition. Meanwhile, Damian starts thinking about who he is if he's more than a trained weapon designed to kill people.

entry.title: Baby Fever
entry.summary:
Author: batsandbees

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,317Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 116

Summary: "Do you think you can just take the tip?" Dick asked, leaning back a bit to watch Tim bite his lip, brows furrowing as he debated with himself. "I think— yeah," Tim said, hesitant "Just— Just the tip, okay?" He looked up at Dick with wide, teary eyes. Trusting. Dick groaned, "Yeah," He said, a little breathlessly "Just the tip." This time.
